'''Djulla''' was a [[Aleena/Legends|Aleena]] who was sold into [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]] after her father, [[Ratts Tyerell/Legends|Ratts Tyerell]], died in the [[Boonta Eve Classic (32 BBY)/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] [[Podracing/Legends|podrace]] of [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. When Djulla's uncle sold her to [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]], her brother [[Deland Tyerell/Legends|Deland Tyerell]] tried to free them by beating Sebulba's son [[Hekula]] in a celebrated though illegal podrace at the [[Great Dordon Caves]] on the outskirts of [[Eusebus|Euceron City]] during the [[Galactic Games/Legends|Galactic Games]] of [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]].

Unfortunately, Sebulba broke Deland's arm before the race, and all Djulla's hopes seemed lost. But to help them, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] raced Deland's podracer in his stead, beating Hekula and thereby gaining Djulla's freedom.<ref name="JQ" />
